## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Projectmark and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and optimization of the blog for lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift to publishing content at 70-80% quality, then refine based on traffic performance](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing blog design for lead capture and conversion (e.g., email forms, CTAs)](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Balance bottom-of-funnel (BoFu) content with top-of-funnel (ToFu) to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Ensure CRM-related content accurately reflects Projectmark's capabilities within construction industry](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Tom acknowledges being a bottleneck in content review due to lack of marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Agreement to publish content at 70-80% quality to accelerate indexing and data collection](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Strategy to refine high-performing articles post-publication based on traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [22 published articles have generated 1.3K impressions and 10 total clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Business development-related articles performing relatively better](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Existing AEC (Architecture, Engineering, Construction) company articles showing good performance](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [Shift focus from exclusively bottom-of-funnel to include more top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Goal: Build domain authority and increase overall traffic to boost rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Utilize high-performing BoFu content as lead magnets for ToFu visitors](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Blog Optimization for Conversion

  - [Implement lead capture elements (email forms, pop-ups) throughout blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Add CTAs, case studies, and product trial offers to increase conversion opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Improve interlinking between articles to guide visitor journey](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Content Relevance and Accuracy

  - [Ensure CRM-related topics accurately reflect Projectmark's capabilities in construction](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Adjust article titles and content to avoid misrepresenting CRM functionality in construction](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Convert some CRM-specific topics to more general construction industry topics where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tom to review and approve publication of 22 pending blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Marketing team to implement blog design optimizations based on shared examples (e.g., Gong, Strapi)](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Sami to send Tom a list of upcoming topics for quick relevance review](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Team to rework any articles that need adjustment in CRM angle or generalization](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Continue producing financial management cluster content with approved topics](https://fathom.video/share/Wb2sE-3Ds8vgv8UoA7Mdtm_-9mcw5ffm?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
